IBEW.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Indoor Locals — Monday, July 13, 2026**

**LU-494 Milwaukee, WI** — This is the move right now. Gurtz, MJ Electric, and Uihlein are all hammering the Port Washington Data Center at **JW wage plus $10/hr** — that's pure premium on top of scale, not some sketchy incentive that disappears. Gurtz wants 60 hrs/week, MJ and Uihlein are 50–58 with no games. Book's got 191 hands against 43 calls, so you're looking at real traction fast.

**LU-481 Indianapolis, IN** — Meade's running the Meta Data Center in Lebanon at **$53.80/hr** (10% over scale), and they're stacking 5-12s Monday through Friday. That's 60 hours a week at premium pay. Google's Mooresville job (Ermco) is new construction outdoor work, but the IU Hospital indoor AC gig with Industrial Electric runs 5-10s plus Saturday if you've got OSHA 10. Top scale $54.75; book depth is solid at 191 hands for 43 calls.

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** — Parsons is running dual calls on the Polaris Forge Data Center at **$44.80/hr** but here's the kicker: **$100/day non-taxed per diem** if you're 100+ miles out, plus another **$100/day incentive** Mon–Fri and **$150 on weekends**. That's real money stacked on top. 6-10s, 37 and 28 bodies needed. Hunt Electric's at the Air Base, same wage, 4-10s with Friday OT.

**LU-430 Racine, WI** — Microsoft Mount Pleasant is a four-contractor push at **$62.51/hr**, cleanest scale in this snapshot. Gerdes, Pieper, Staff, and Kelso Burnett all pulling from the same job, all same pay. Work's already live (started late June), and the board's thin—76 hands against 11 calls. You walk in Monday, you're on Wednesday.

**LU-237 Niagara Falls, NY** — Lake Mariner Data Center is the anchor: O'Connell's got 35 hands needed, Ferguson's got 27, and both run 7-10s with per diem available. Orientations Monday/Tuesday/Thursday. Amazon work through BCU (5-10s, 1-8 Sat). Board's tight at 103 hands for 9 calls—book one's moving.

**LU-379 Charlotte, NC** — Gross, Miller, and Rosendin are scattered across three SC/NC data centers. Gross pays **$4 above scale** at MOC-1 Spartanburg; Rosendin's Newton job offers **$3.50/hr over** plus a **$150 boot voucher** at 90 days, and it's night shift (48–54 hrs). Miller's QTS gig is standing calls, 4-10s and 2-8s.

**Market snapshot:** Data centers are eating the board—906 calls nationwide, and nearly every standout local is running DC work. Milwaukee, Indianapolis, and Grand Forks are moving bodies fastest because they're stacking premium pay *and* 50–60 hour weeks. The hands are following the hours and the per diem.

LINEMAN.text:
**Trampin the IBEW Lineman Locals — Monday, July 13, 2026**

**LU-71 Columbus, OH** is running hot with 34 calls and 109 hands on the books. New River Electric Corp. is hammering distribution work across Columbus and Southern Ohio—37 JM linemen at **$61.44/hr**, **$125/day per diem** for nights stayed, plus a **$100 bonus** if you work every available shift. CDL A required. Thayer Power's reconduct and make-ready jobs in Columbus are moving needle too.

**LU-1426 Grand Forks, ND** has 25 calls open—mostly inside work but solid money. Parsons Electric's Polaris Forge Data Center in Harwood is the anchor: **$44.80/hr** base with **$100/day non-taxed incentive** M-F, jumping to **$150 Sat/Sun**. That's 65 hands they need across two calls. Apex Line Contractors is also pulling JM linemen at true scale **$58.50/hr** with matching incentive structure. ND reciprocal license within 30 days if you've got reciprocity.

**LU-583 El Paso, TX** sits at 10 calls, 114 hands deep. Summit Line, Cupertino Electric, and B&D Industries are all running projects at **$55/hr**, with double-time OT and NM State JIW License EE98J required. Rosendin's at **$40/hr** base but throws **$15 incentive** for hitting 90% of 60-hour weeks—harder grind for lighter money.

**LU-1547 Anchorage, AK** is desperate: 47 calls but only 59 hands available. Top scale is **$76.59/hr**, though most live calls are laborer and tree work ($30–$43/hr). Real lineman work is thin up there right now.

**LU-474 Memphis, TN** has the Google Data Center job in West Memphis, Arkansas running at **$36.65/hr** with **$125/day incentive pay**—38 hands needed on 4/10s and 2/8s. It's lower scale but steady, and Arkansas license is your gate.

Data centers and transmission rebuild are vacuuming up available hands; inside work is where the volume is right now.
